info.title: BankID CSC API
info.description: This document contains the API description for BankID CSC API

post.summary: Returns information about the Remote Service and the list of the API methods implemented and supported by it.
post.description: Returns information about the Remote Service and the list of the API methods implemented and supported by it.

value.errorDescription: The request is missing a required parameter, includes an invalid parameter value, or is otherwise malformed
An internal server error occurred
The service is temporarily unavailable

post.description: Exchange the authorization code received from the authorization endpoint for an access token. When PKCE is used, the `code_verifier` parameter is required to validate against the `code_challenge` from the authorization request.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters or PKCE validation failed

invalid_grant.summary: Invalid authorization code or PKCE validation failed

value.error_description: The provided authorization code is invalid, expired, or the code_verifier does not match the code_challenge
The authorization server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request
The service is temporarily overloaded or under maintenance

post.summary: Returns the list of credentials associated with a user identifier
post.description: Returns the list of credentials associated with a user identifier

value.errorDescription: The request is missing a required parameter, includes an invalid parameter value, or is otherwise malformed
One or more request parameters are invalid or missing

post.summary: Retrieve the credential and return the main identity information and the public key certificate or the certificate chain associated to it.
post.x-original-summary: Retrieve the credential and return the main identity information and the public key certificate or the certificate chain associated to it.
post.description: Retrieve the credential and return the main identity information and the public key certificate or the certificate chain associated to it. If the credential is authorized for remote signing, the information about the authorization mechanism is also returned.

The certificate has expired
The certificate has been revoked

404.description: Not Found - Credential or certificate not found

value.errorDescription: The specified credential was not found
The certificate was not found
An internal server error occurred

The service is temporarily unavailable

get.description: Initiates user authentication and signature consent. Redirects to `redirect_uri` with `code` and `state`. PKCE: `code_challenge` (S256) required and must match `code_verifier` at /oauth2/token. scope optional (default `esign/csc`); add `esign/nnin` to include NNIN in the certificate.

302.description: After an attempted authorization, the authorization server will redirect the user-agent back to the specified redirect_uri with query parameters.

post.summary: Authorize the access to the credential for remote signing, according to the authorization mechanisms associated to it.
post.description: Authorize the access to the credential for remote signing, according to the authorization mechanisms associated to it.

ResponseType.name: response_type
ResponseType.description: OAuth2 response type (e.g., `code` for authorization code).

ClientId.name: client_id
ClientId.description: The client identifier issued to the client.

RedirectUri.name: redirect_uri
RedirectUri.description: The URI to redirect to after authorization.

Lang.name: lang
Lang.description: Language preference for the UI. Supported values are nb (Norwegian Bokmål), nn (Norwegian Nynorsk) or en (English).

schema.description: Request a preferred language according to RFC 5646 with only the primary language subtag.

State.name: state
State.description: An opaque value to maintain state between the request and callback.

schema.description: State parameter to maintain request context.

CSCToken.description: The token is obtained from the `/oauth2/token` endpoint.

code_challenge_method.description: PKCE code challenge method. Must be 'S256' for SHA256 hashing.

state.description: State parameter to maintain request context.

code.description: The authorization code generated by the authorization server.

state.description: The state parameter to maintain request context.

error.description: Error code, returned only if there is an error.

error_description.description: A human-readable description of the error.

error_uri.description: A URI that provides more details about the error. Not yet implemented

access_token.description: The short-lived service access token used to authenticate the subsequent API requests within the same session.

authMode.description: Specifies one of the authorization modes

authType.description: Specifies one or more values corresponding to the authentication mechanisms supported by the Remote Service

items.description: Specifies one or more values corresponding to the authentication mechanisms supported by the Remote Service

cert.description: Contains information about the signature certificate

certificates.description: Contains one or more Base64-encoded X.509v3 certificates from the certificate chain

issuerDN.description: The Issuer Subject Distinguished Name from the X.509v3 end entity certificate in printable string format

serialNumber.description: The Serial Number from the X.509v3 certificate in hex encoded format

subjectDN.description: The Distinguished Name from the X.509v3 certificate in printable string format

validFrom.description: The validity start date from the X.509v3 certificate in printable string format

validTo.description: The validity end date from the X.509v3 certificate in printable string format

certInfo.description: Specifies if the information on the end entity certificate shall be returned as printable strings

clientData.description: Arbitrary data from the Signature Application

code_verifier.description: The PKCE code verifier used to validate the code_challenge from the authorization request. A cryptographically random string using the characters [A-Z] / [a-z] / [0-9] / '-' / '.' / '_' / '~', between 43 and 128 characters long.

credentialID.description: The identifier associated to the credential

credentialIDs.description: One or more credentialID associated with the provided or implicit userID

description.description: Contains a free form description of the authorization transaction in the lang language

expires_in.description: The lifetime in seconds of the service access token.

expiresIn.description: The lifetime in seconds of the service access token

hashes.description: One or more Base64-encoded hash values to be signed

items.description: Single Base64-encoded hash value to be signed

hashAlgorithmOID.description: Specifies the OID of the algorithm used to calculate the hash value(s). Only 2.16.840.1.101.3.4.2.1 is supported (SHA-256).

hashTBS.description: The Base64-encoded hash value to be time stamped

status.description: The status of enablement of the signing key of the credential

algo.description: The list of OIDs of the supported key algorithms

len.description: The length of the cryptographic key in bits

curve.description: The OID of the ECDSA curve

lang.description: Request a preferred language according to RFC 3066

logo.description: The URI of the image file containing the logo of the Remote Service which shall be published online

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return

methods.description: Specifies the list of names of all the API methods

multisign.description: Specifies if the credential supports multiple signatures to be created with a single authorization request

name.description: The commercial name of the Remote Service

nonce.description: Specifies a large random number with a high probability that it is generated by the Signature Application only once

numSignatures.description: The number of signatures to authorize

oauth2.description: Specifies the complete URI of the OAuth 2.0 service authorization endpoint provided by the Remote Service

pageToken.description: The page token for the new page of items

refresh_token.description: The long-lived refresh token returned from the previous HTTP Basic Authentication

region.description: The ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 code of the Country where the Remote Service provider is established

rememberMe.description: option that the user may activate during the authentication phase to stay signed in

SAD.description: The Signature Activation Data to provide as input to the signatures/signHash method.

SCAL.description: Specifies the Sole Control Assurance Level required by the credential, as defined in CEN EN 419 241-1

description.description: A free form description of the credential in the lang language. Maximum size is 255 characters.

signatureQualifier.description: Identifier qualifying the type of signature this credential is suitable for

mode.description: Specifies one of the authorization modes

expression.description: An expression defining the combination of authentication objects required to authorize usage of the private key

objects.description: The authentication object types available for this credential

id.description: The identifier of the authentication object

format.description: The format of the authentication object

label.description: The label of the authentication object

description.description: The description of the authentication object

signAlgo.description: Specifies the OID of the algorithm to use for signing. Only 1.2.840.10045.4.3.2 is supported (ecdsa-with-SHA256).

signAlgoParams.description: Specifies the Base64-encoded of DER-encoded ASN.1 signature parameters

timestamp.description: The Base64-encoded time-stamp token as defined in RFC 3161 as updated by RFC 5816

specs.description: The version of this specification implemented by the provider

token.description: The token that the Signature Application wants to get revoked.

token_type_hint.description: Specifies an optional hint about the type of the token submitted for revocation.

userID.description: The user identifier associated to the user identity

authInfo.description: Request to return various parameters containing information on the authorization mechanisms supported by the corresponding credential

onlyValid.description: Request to return only credentials usable to create a valid signature. This service only returns valid credentials.

authInfo.description: Specifies if the information on the authorization mechanism shall be returned

description.description: A free form description of the remote service in the lang language. The maximum size of the string is 255 characters.

oauth2Issuer.description: The issuer URL of the OAuth 2.0 authorization server as defined in IETF RFC 8414

asynchronousOperationMode.description: This parameter shall be true if the remote signing server supports also asynchronous signature mechanism. The default value is false.

validationInfo.description: This parameter SHALL be true if the remote signing server supports the validationInfo response parameter of the method signatures/signDoc in not mandatory cases.

signAlgorithms.description: Object including one or more signature algorithms supported by the RSSP

algos.description: The list of signature algorithms supported by the RSSP

algoParams.description: The list of eventual signature parameters

signature_formats.description: Object including one or more signature formats supported by the RSSP

formats.description: The list of signature formats supported by the RSSP

envelope_properties.description: The list of the properties concerning the signed envelope

conformance_levels.description: The list of names of all signature conformance levels supported by the RSSP

example.description: This is the CSC API of the ACME Trust Services
example.name: ACME Trust Services

oauth2-error-response.description: OAuth2 error response as defined in RFC 6749

error_description.description: Human-readable ASCII text providing additional information about the error

error_uri.description: A URI identifying a human-readable web page with information about the error

example.error_description: The provided authorization code is invalid, expired, or the code_verifier does not match the code_challenge

csc-error-response.description: CSC API error response as defined in CSC API v2.0.0.2 specification

errorCode.description: A single ASCII error code as defined in the CSC specification

errorDescription.description: Human-readable ASCII text providing additional information about the error

errorReference.description: A unique reference identifier for this specific error occurrence, used for support and troubleshooting

example.errorDescription: The request is missing a required parameter, includes an invalid parameter value, or is otherwise malformed

credentialInfos.description: The contents of credentialInfo objects. If the credentialInfo parameter is not true, this value SHALL NOT be returned.

onlyValid.description: This value SHALL be returned true when the input parameter onlyValid was true, and the RSSP supports this feature

objects.label: Out of the band (IdP)
objects.description: Pre authorization will be used for credential authorization

signatureQualifier.description: Identifier qualifying the type of signature this credential is suitable for (see signatures/signDoc)
